summary: OMN-7428 implementation already landed in omniclaude PR #1104 (feat(contracts): populate golden_path and dod_evidence in skeleton generator). The generate_skeleton_contract() function in plugins/onex/skills/_lib/contract_generator/generate_contract.py accepts dod_items and builds dod_evidence entries via _infer_dod_checks keyword heuristics.
